title: Roadster Baseball Car Lock
description: Product Description The Roadster Baseball Car Lock is a mechanical anti theft car device. This top performance auto security lock prevents the steering wheel from rotating. Non duplicate keys are provided and used with special tubular combinations that are impossible to detect. Easy to use and universal this product has simple to follow instructions. It is worth noting that many new vehicles already have an anti lock device fitted so this item will not fit. Please check your vehicles specifications. Box Contains 1 x Car Lock
